artifact_summary: Instrumentation and control logic for a polymer feed system in a dewatering facility, covering flow from bulk storage to feeders.
artifact_blurb: A detailed Piping and Instrumentation Diagram (P&ID) defining the instrumentation architecture and control logic for a polymer feed subsystem within a dewatering operation. The schematic maps the material transport trajectory from polymer bulk storage tanks, through mixing and metering pump stations, to the final polymer feeders, while explicitly documenting associated electrical wiring and Programmable Logic Controller (PLC) interconnections.

The schematic maps the material transport trajectory from polymer bulk storage tanks, through mixing and metering pump stations, to the final polymer feeders, while explicitly documenting associated electrical wiring and Programmable Logic Controller (PLC) interconnections.
